description_long: This is a futuristic shotgun with a sleek, angular design, predominantly finished in metallic silver and blue tones. The body features a combination of smooth and textured surfaces, with blue illuminated accents along the lower receiver and grip. The top of the shotgun has a prominent rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is vented with ribbing for heat dissipation. The grip is ergonomically shaped with a textured blue surface for enhanced handling, and the trigger area is protected by a robust, angular guard. The overall construction suggests a blend of advanced polymers and metals, giving it a high-tech, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, futuristic shotgun with metallic silver and blue finishes, illuminated accents, and an ergonomic, textured grip. It features a vented barrel, top rail, and angular trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the illuminated blue accents, vented barrel, and detailed grip texture.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening, top rail, and the symmetry of the shotgun's design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the same illuminated accents and grip details, with clear visibility of the trigger and safety switch.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the top rail and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Angular, elongated trigger guard with reinforced edges and a squared-off front
